[[Clone Commander]]<ref name="AbEverything">''[[Star Wars: Absolutely Everything You Need to Know]]''</ref> '''Deviss''' was an [[Advanced Recon Commando]]<ref name="The Amazing Book">''[[The Amazing Book of Star Wars]]''</ref> and [[clone trooper officer]] who served in the [[Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Their equipment included [[Color|red]] outlined [[Phase II clone trooper armor]], a [[pauldron]], a [[kama]], [[macrobinoculars]], a [[DC-15A blaster rifle]], and two [[DC-17 repeater hand blaster]]s.<ref name="AbEverything" />

Like all [[clone trooper]]s, Deviss was created on the [[planet]] of [[Kamino]] based on the [[Clone template|genetic template]] of the [[human]] [[Gender|male]] [[bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett]], stood 1.83 [[meter]]s and had tan skin.<ref name="Clone Troopers" /> Deviss received training through the [[ARC program]]<ref name="ARC note">''[[Rise of the Separatists]]'' establishes that [[Advanced Recon Commando]]s receive [[ARC program]] training prior to becoming ARC [[trooper]]s.</ref> to prepare them for special missions.<ref name="The Amazing Book" />

==Behind the scenes==
Deviss was first mentioned in the new ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] in the [[2015]] reference book ''[[Star Wars: Absolutely Everything You Need to Know]]''.<ref name="AbEverything" /> Deviss is based on Clone Commander [[Bly]]'s original color design, which was changed to better match the environment of the [[Planet|world]] [[Felucia]] from [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']].<ref name="Commander Bly">{{DB|character|commanderbly|Bly, Commander}}</ref> While the red clone commander does not appear in the movie,<ref name="RotS">{{Film|III}}</ref> he was pictured, albeit unnamed, in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity in ''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Visual Dictionary]]'', a guide book published in [[2005]] and written by [[James Luceno]],<ref name="ROTS TVD">''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> and used as the basis of a "Clone Commander" figure for the film's [[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (toy line)|toy line]] by [[Hasbro]].<ref name="Hasbro">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (toy line)|pack=#33: Clone Commander (Battle Gear!) (Red)|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/rots0533clonecmdr.asp}}</ref> The commander was later identified as [[Deviss/Legends|Deviss]] and received the designation CT-65/91-6210 in ''[[Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic]]'', a reference article published in the [[Star Wars Insider 84|eighty-fourth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine.<ref name="Guide to GAR">{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}}</ref>
